mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_practice_items (user_id, level, exam_type, topic, transcript, storage_key, translation, questions, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{level}, #{examType}, #{topic}, #{transcript}, #{storageKey}, #{translation}, #{questionsJson}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, level, exam_type, topic, transcript, storage_key, translation, questions AS questions_json, created_at FROM listening_practice_items WHERE id = #{itemId}

SELECT id, user_id, level, exam_type, topic, transcript, storage_key, translation, questions AS questions_json, created_at FROM listening_practice_items WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE listening_practice_items SET storage_key = #{storageKey} WHERE id = #{itemId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO listening_attempts (practice_item_id, user_id, answers, results, score, created_at) VALUES (#{practiceItemId}, #{userId}, #{answersJson}, #{resultsJson}, #{score}, now())
mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, a.practice_item_id AS practice_item_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, a.score AS score, a.created_at AS created_at FROM listening_attempts a JOIN listening_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT a.id AS attempt_id, i.level AS level, i.exam_type AS exam_type, i.topic AS topic, i.transcript AS transcript, i.translation AS translation, a.results AS results_json, a.score AS score, a.created_at AS created_at FROM listening_attempts a JOIN listening_practice_items i ON i.id = a.practice_item_id WHERE a.id = #{attemptId} AND a.user_id = #{userId}
